compiler_gap_policy: Profiles expose declared fidelity; native IDE files are emitted by governed projection drivers through the fidelity-preserving adapter compiler.
fidelity_policy: Declare adapter fidelity from primitive contracts; do not infer enforcement from advisory files.
limitations: Structural Augment/Auggie CLI flag input files proof only; no account-backed Augment runtime invocation in automated tests.
No native COS lifecycle hook parity is claimed.
Files require operator invocation with --rules and --mcp-config; no user-global settings are written.
